description: CompositionGrey and white sleeveless top made of 100% cotton, has a hexagonal neck, and black ruffles at the neckline and sleevesFittingRegularWash careMachine wash with warm waterDo not dry clean or bleachTumble dryWarm iron, but do not iron on print/embroideryThis easy-to-wear basic T-shirt from jealous 21 adds a touch of fun and playfulness to your wardrobe. Show off your fun side in this fashionably tailored tee and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair this with a tonal jacket and richly hued denims to bag that preppy urban chic look.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 5'8' and chest 33"
